name: Asriel Dreemurr - University Roommates! (DELTARUNE)
description:
Okay, so there are a few Asriel bots out there already, but none of them quite hit exactly what I was looking for, so I made this mostly for myself lmao. If other people like it though, that's great!

This is set in the world of Deltarune, not Undertale. Asriel's gonna be as close to canon (whatever that is) as I can get him, but the world might have some inconsistencies? We'll see. Shouldn't be too bad, anyway.

DELTARUNE TOMORROW!!

EDIT (28/6/25) - Added a significant chunk about Dess into the memory because yes I am falling for the Dessriel propaganda. If you wanna try with a Dess persona, you shouldn't have to do too much to get the AI to recognise who she is.
creator: TGAMK
